violations.text: Deli Meat and Cheese were observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit in the reach in cooler. The reach in cooler was observed overfilled. Ambient temperature was observed 52 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per person in charge, the fridge was stocked less than 3 hours prior to inspection. All foods moved to different refrigeration to rapidly cool. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026
